summary: Executed all 20 e2e tests for typed-task-dispatch feature using Playwright. All tests passed (19 passed, 1 skipped). Tests cover CLI functionality including task prompt generation, type validation, migration, and skill routing.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: All tests pass (PASS status in results)

notes: TC-007 was skipped because it requires an already-typed index and the current task (T-test-3) is in_progress. All other tests passed successfully.
